AccountSlugExists(string) 

[Authorize("TenantAdmin")]
[HttpGet("{accountSlug}/DoesAccountExist")]
[SwaggerOperation(null, null, Summary = "Checks for the existance of an account slug")]
public Task<bool> AccountSlugExists(string accountSlug)

Parameters

accountSlug string

Returns

Task<bool>

AddAccount(AddAccount) 

[Authorize("TenantAdmin")]
[HttpPost("AddAccount")]
[SwaggerOperation(null, null, Summary = "Creates a new Account with ShipTo and BillTo Addresses (if specified)")]
public Task<Account> AddAccount(AddAccount addAccount)

Parameters

addAccount AddAccount

Returns

Task<Account>

Returns

Task<Contact>

[HttpPost("{accountSlug}/AddAccountExpense")]

Parameters

accountSlug string
addAccountExpense AddAccountExpense

Returns

Task<AccountExpense>

[HttpDelete("{accountSlug}/DeleteAccountExpense")]

Task<AccountExpense>

externalID int
